---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable? Link to
[ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) if this relates to a planned phase.

## Proposed solution

Describe the change. If it touches the CleverVault contract, the on-chain
registry, the MCP server, or the agent SDK, say so — these are the current
priority areas.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, references, related issues.
